intent: Generate a markdown traceability report with coverage data and inspect the output

annotations.label: FR | Tests | Source | ADRs
annotations.note: Cross-dimensional matrix header — four traceability axes

annotations.label: 0 tests / 0 ADRs
annotations.note: Row with zero coverage — candidate for remediation

steps.intent: Cargo compiles and launches the traceability tool
Coverage summary: total FRs/NFRs, fully traced, zero coverage counts
Markdown header section with FR inventory table
FR rows showing test references and coverage marks
Prompt returned after the report preview
